caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt accented with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and displays of clothing, including a yellow "LEE" shirt. In the lower corners of the scene, a logo for "THE TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible, accompanied by the text "TALK JOY" and "THE TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, his expression and mouth movements changing slightly as he speaks. His posture remains steady, while the background elements and recording equipment remain static throughout the frames.
